title: helianthus decapetalus f. multiflorus
intro: Helianthus decapetalus f. multiflorus, also known as the Maximillian sunflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The Maximillian sunflower has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Helianthus decapetalus f. multiflorus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
